ddls:
CREATE TABLE "atmospheric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "pressure" INTEGER /* Atmospheric pressure in pascals */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Kelvin */,
  "IWV" REAL /* Integrated water vapor */,
  "ZTD" REAL /* Zenith tropospheric delay */,
  "RMS_error" REAL /* Root mean square error of the data */,
  "data_points_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points used in the calculation */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., pressure, temperature) */,
  "collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_quality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_atmospheric_data_data_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_id") REFERENCES data_quality ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., surface, upper-air) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument used (e.g., radar, lidar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "RMS_error" REAL /* Root mean square error of the data */,
  "data_points_count" INTEGER /* Number of data points used in the calculation */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data (e.g., research, quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., csv, netcdf) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., instrument, location) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., graph, map) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization file */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES atmospheric_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_data" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the research project */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the atmospheric data */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date the project used the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "data_id")
)
